statement: In every magma, Equation 2366 (`x = (y * (z * (x * x))) * z`) implies Equation 2498 (`x = (y * ((x * x) * y)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0681
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op x x))) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x x) y)) z)
